mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name AS ruleName, warning_type AS warningType, period_days AS periodDays, trigger_threshold AS triggerThreshold, applicable_store_ids AS applicableStoreIds FROM pt_exception_warning_rule WHERE status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_exception_warning_record (rule_id, warning_type, member_id, coach_id, store_id, period_start, period_end, trigger_value, trigger_desc, warning_time) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{warningType}, #{memberId}, #{coachId}, #{storeId}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{triggerValue}, #{triggerDesc}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE trigger_value = VALUES(trigger_value), trigger_desc = VALUES(trigger_desc), coach_id = VALUES(coach_id), warning_time = NOW()
